name: Graves disease / hyperthyroidism

patient.free_text: 6-week history of 6 kg unintended weight loss despite increased appetite, heat intolerance, palpitations, anxiety, and fine tremor. Diffuse goiter palpable, mild proptosis.

notes: HOLDOUT — do not tune against. Suppressed TSH + elevated free T4 + classic hypermetabolic symptoms + proptosis.
